CHAMP-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.title: Skill Bonus
CHAMP-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.description:
If you are in a [gold]Stance[/gold], trigger its Skill Bonus.
[gold]Berserker[/gold] Skill: Gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
[gold]Defensive[/gold] Skill: Gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Counter[/gold].
Can trigger up to [blue]3[/blue] times.
